title: Gage R&R Cost Analysis
description: Calculates the total cost of measurement system variation (repeatability and reproducibility) based on MSA studies, including hidden losses and confidence-adjusted estimates.

inputs.label: Number of Parts in Study
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.

label_i18n.de: Anzahl der Teile in der Studie
label_i18n.es: Número de piezas en el estudio

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gage R&R çalışması için seçilen farklı parça sayısı, AIAG MSA kılavuzuna göre genellikle 5-20.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der ausgewählten unterschiedlichen Teile für die Gage-R&R-Studie, typischerweise 5-20 gemäß AIAG-MSA-Richtlinien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pièces distinctes sélectionnées pour l'étude R&R, généralement 5 à 20 selon les directives AIAG MSA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de piezas distintas seleccionadas para el estudio de R&R del calibre, típicamente 5-20 según las pautas de AIAG MSA.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد القطع المميزة المختارة لدراسة Gage R&R، عادة من 5 إلى 20 وفقًا لإرشادات AIAG MSA.

inputs.label: Number of Appraisers
inputs.businessContext: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçümleri gerçekleştiren operatör veya değerlendirici sayısı, tekrarlanabilirlik tahmini için minimum 2.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Bediener oder Prüfer, die Messungen durchführen, mindestens 2 für die Reproduzierbarkeitsschätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'opérateurs ou d'évaluateurs effectuant les mesures, minimum 2 pour l'estimation de la reproductibilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de operadores o evaluadores que realizan mediciones, mínimo 2 para la estimación de reproducibilidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المشغلين أو المقيّمين الذين يقومون بالقياسات، الحد الأدنى 2 لتقدير قابلية التكرار.

inputs.label: Number of Trials per Part
inputs.businessContext: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her değerlendirici tarafından her parça için yapılan tekrarlı ölçüm sayısı, genellikle 2-3.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der wiederholten Messungen pro Teil und Prüfer, typischerweise 2-3.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mesures répétées par pièce par opérateur, généralement 2 à 3.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de mediciones repetidas por pieza por evaluador, típicamente 2-3.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد القياسات المتكررة لكل قطعة لكل مقيّم، عادة 2-3.

inputs.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışmadaki tüm ölçümlerin standart sapması, toplam proses değişimini temsil eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardabweichung aller Messungen in der Studie, die die gesamte Prozessvariation darstellt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart-type de toutes les mesures de l'étude, représentant la variation totale du procédé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de todas las mediciones en el estudio, representando la variación total del proceso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري لجميع القياسات في الدراسة، ويمثل التباين الكلي للعملية.

inputs.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmandan kaynaklanan değişim (aynı operatör, aynı parça, tekrarlanan ölçümler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Variation aufgrund der Ausrüstung (gleicher Bediener, gleiches Teil, wiederholte Messungen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Variation due à l'équipement (même opérateur, même pièce, mesures répétées).
businessContext_i18n.es: Variación debida al equipo (mismo operador, misma pieza, mediciones repetidas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التباين الناتج عن المعدات (نفس المشغل، نفس القطعة، قياسات متكررة).

inputs.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı parçayı ölçen farklı operatörlerden kaynaklanan değişim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Streuung durch verschiedene Bediener, die dasselbe Teil messen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Variation due à différents opérateurs mesurant la même pièce.
businessContext_i18n.es: Variación debida a diferentes operadores midiendo la misma pieza.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التباين الناتج عن اختلاف المشغلين عند قياس نفس القطعة.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (Internal)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygun olmayan bir birimin dahili olarak tespit edilmesi durumunda oluşan ortalama maliyet (fire, yeniden işleme, muayene).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten, die bei intern erkannter Nichtkonformität anfallen (Ausschuss, Nacharbeit, Prüfung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen encouru lorsqu'une unité non conforme est détectée en interne (rebut, reprise, inspection).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio incurrido cuando una unidad no conforme se detecta internamente (desperdicio, retrabajo, inspección).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة المتكبدة عند اكتشاف وحدة غير مطابقة داخليًا (هدر، إعادة عمل، فحص).

inputs.label: Cost per Escaped Defect (External)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir hatanın müşteriye ulaşması durumunda oluşan ortalama maliyet (garanti, sorumluluk, kaybedilen satışlar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten, wenn ein Fehler den Kunden erreicht (Garantie, Haftung, Umsatzverluste).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen lorsqu'un défaut atteint le client (garantie, responsabilité, pertes de ventes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio cuando un defecto llega al cliente (garantía, responsabilidad, pérdida de ventas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة عندما يصل العيب إلى العميل (ضمان، مسؤولية، خسارة مبيعات).

rules.message: Sum of repeatability and reproducibility variation must not exceed total observed variation.
Number of parts must be at least 2.
Number of appraisers must be at least 2.
Number of trials must be at least 2.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 1,000,000 ppm.

thresholds.label: %GRR Threshold
thresholds.message: %GRR exceeds 30% — measurement system is unacceptable per AIAG guidelines.

thresholds.label: Number of Distinct Categories (ndc) Threshold
thresholds.message: ndc is less than 5 — measurement system cannot adequately distinguish between parts.

thresholds.label: Annual Cost Impact Threshold
thresholds.message: Annual cost from measurement error exceeds $50,000 — immediate action recommended.

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
Direct labor cost is set to 0 because no labor-related inputs are available in this tool
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
